_notes.max_cyclomatic_complexity: Heuristic complexity estimate — not AST-based, use as a rough guide
_notes.max_file_lines: Files over this line count trigger a warning
_notes.max_function_lines: Functions over this line count trigger a warning in verifiable-thresholds hook
_notes.max_lint_warnings: Informational — enforce 0 lint warnings in CI
_notes.min_test_coverage_pct: Null = not checked by hook (enforce in CI with pytest-cov or lcov)
_notes.no_todo_fixme_in_new_code: Warn when TODO/FIXME markers are present in written files
